title: Armed police swarm Asda supermarket in Barnstaple after 'men with a gun' spotted
description: Armed police officers with guns were seen in the supermarket car park.

title: JosPlay Releases Raw & Rising Playlist Volume 2
description: Nigerian International music streaming platform, JosPlay, has released the second volume of its ‘Raw and Rising’ Playlist. The Raw and Rising Playlist is part of the reward for Independent African artistes and African music artistes in diaspora, who are registered on the JosPlay app and applied for the JosPlay Rise Fund. title: Serbia's weapons exports to Israel soar to record levels
description: Serbia’s weapons shipments to Israel doubled in 2025, continuing despite earlier export restrictions by Belgrade.

title: PNP to Piston: Reconsider March 19 strike, but security still ready
description: MANILA, Philippines — Philippine National Police (PNP) chief Gen. Jose Melencio Nartatez Jr. hopes transport group Piston reconsiders its strike this coming Thursday, March 19. “While we understand the concerns being raised by those in the public transportation sector, we hope that they reconsider their decision to hold a strike for this is really not a time for that,” Nartatez said in a statement on Tuesday. READ: PNP wants to coordinate with Piston for March 19 transport strike “Nevertheless, your PNP is ready to maintain peace and order and assist commuters,” he stressed, later appealing to Piston to “police their [...]... Keep on reading: PNP to Piston: Reconsider March 19 strike, but security still ready

title: ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund: HDFC Bank and Infosys among top 10 stock holdings in February
D’Tigress’ Shooting Guard Ogoke Retires From International Basketball
description: March 17, (THEWILL) — Nigeria’s D’Tigress captain Sarah Ogoke has retired from the national women’s basketball team after 15 years of international service, closing the most decorated individual career in African women’s basketball history. The 35-year-old shooting guard is the only player on the continent to have won five consecutive FIBA Women’s AfroBasket titles, completing [...] The post D’Tigress’ Shooting Guard Ogoke Retires From International Basketball appeared first on THEWILL NEWS MEDIA .

title: Chevy Chase Trust Holdings LLC Sells 27,478 Shares of Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. $CMG
description: Chevy Chase Trust Holdings LLC cut its holdings in Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. (NYSE:CMG – Free Report) by 3.8% in the third quarter, according to the company in its most recent Form 13F filing with the SEC. The institutional investor owned 694,969 shares of the restaurant operator’s stock after selling 27,478 shares during the quarter. [...]

title: Finnish President Alexander Stubb Says India Can Play Diplomatic Role to Ease US‐Iran Tensions
description: Finnish President Alexander Stubb has suggested that India can play a meaningful diplomatic role in easing tensions between the United States and Iran, calling for an immediate ceasefire as the conflict in West Asia continues to intensify. In a TV interview, Stubb emphasized that global efforts should prioritize halting hostilities and reopening channels for dialogue, [...]
